task_completion.description: Create a sidewalk-enabled network using sidewalk guessing on the existing network.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a terminal command using 'netconvert' with a sidewalk guessing flag (e.g., '--sidewalks.guess') applied to '/home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio/pasubio_buslanes.net.xml', or the existence of '~/SUMO_Output/pasubio_with_sidewalks.net.xml'.

task_completion.description: Generate a pedestrian demand file with at least 10 persons departing within the first 600 seconds.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the creation or content of '~/SUMO_Output/pedestrians.rou.xml' (e.g., via 'randomTrips.py' or a text editor) showing '<person>' elements with 'depart' attributes between 0 and 600, and at least 10 distinct persons.

task_completion.description: Create a SUMO configuration file integrating the new network, pedestrian routes, and original vehicle routes/types, ending at 1800 seconds.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor or 'cat' output of '~/SUMO_Output/pedestrian_sim.sumocfg' containing references to 'pasubio_with_sidewalks.net.xml', 'pedestrians.rou.xml', 'pasubio.rou.xml', 'pasubio_vtypes.add.xml', and an '<end value="1800"/>' tag.

task_completion.description: Run a headless SUMO simulation using the created configuration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a terminal command executing 'sumo' (not 'sumo-gui') with the '-c' flag pointing to '~/SUMO_Output/pedestrian_sim.sumocfg'.

task_completion.description: Produce a trip information report including both vehicle and pedestrian data.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the simulation command including '--tripinfo-output ~/SUMO_Output/tripinfo_ped.xml' (or this setting in the .sumocfg file), and terminal output or file listing confirming 'tripinfo_ped.xml' was successfully generated.

integrity.description: The agent must run the simulation headlessly without using the SUMO GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure 'sumo-gui' is never launched and no SUMO graphical windows appear in the screenshots.

integrity.description: The agent must actually execute the SUMO simulation to generate the tripinfo file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the standard SUMO terminal output showing step progression and simulation completion statistics, rather than the agent manually creating a fake 'tripinfo_ped.xml' file.

integrity.description: The agent must use the provided base scenario files rather than creating dummy files.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that commands and configuration files explicitly reference the '/home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio/' directory for the base network, routes, and vtypes.

Expected configuration file: pedestrian_sim.sumocfg. Expected tripinfo file: tripinfo_ped.xml. Base scenario directory: /home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio.
